p.strong: MESI Protocol State Transitions During Concurrent CAS Operations
p.em: Intel® Architecture Optimization Reference Manual Style

ol.li: Atomic Serialization: LOCK prefix forces a global order on the system bus via IDI (In-Die Interconnect).
RFO Storm: Concurrent CMPXCHG triggers continuous Read-For-Ownership (RFO) requests.
Memory Ordering Clears: Incoming invalidations cause execution units to flush speculative loads, spiking machine_clears.memory_ordering.
Performance Impact: Throughput drops from ~80M ops/sec (single core) to <2M ops/sec (highly contended).
